notes: Each run uses at most 5 keywords (pytrends limit). Timeframe is 'YYYY-MM-DD YYYY-MM-DD'. Geo: US, HR, etc. Google Trends is RELATIVE 0-100 within each run, not absolute volume. Slurs are often 0 or suppressed; treat as suggestive only.
